action.reasoning: Observation: the noisy-validation weight search catastrophically overfit to pseudo8 (high noisy-val but weak clean-test), dropping accuracy to 0.8005. Analysis: noisy validation is not reliable for ensemble-weight optimization when pseudo-labeled models are involved; the prior hand-weighted ConvNeXt+CLIP ensemble remains best at 0.8173. Decision: inspect existing ensemble descriptor formats and weights so I can restore/adjust the validated best ensemble safely in the next step.
